title: selaginella kusaiensis
intro: Selaginella kusaiensis is a species of spore-bearing vascular plant, belonging to the family Selaginellaceae, and is often referred to as a resurrection plant due to its ability to survive extreme drought conditions. The plant is used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Selaginella kusaiensis include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and then used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
